conditional_reachability calm: unsatisfiable
conditional_reachability goal: satisfiable via [safe step]
conditional_reachability hazard: satisfiable via [open]
reachability             calm: reachable via [safe]
reachability             goal: reachable via [open step]
reachability             hazard: reachable via [open]
reachability             start: reachable via []
